aliases: Massacres of El Mozote and nearby places
El Mozote and surrounding hamlets massacre
family_summary: A successive massacre sequence carried out by Salvadoran military units in the El Mozote village cluster in northern Morazán between 11 and 13 December 1981.
notes: This bundle is limited to the main massacre window and directly affected village cluster, not the Salvadoran civil war as a whole.
